meaning: n.(由有类似血清反应的血清型组成的) 血清组
examples: Two cerebrospinal fluid specimens have tested positive for Neisseria meningitidis serogroup by latex test.
VP7, the most conserved protein of the virion, is serogroup-specific antigen.
Serogroup a has been confirmed by the National Institute of Communicable Diseases (NICD).
